title: Well-done: EUI-64 generation via SHA-256 of full hwid
description: lora_l2.c:87-138 hashes the full hardware ID to produce EUI-64 rather than using raw bytes. The comment explains why: MCU-specific layouts vary (STM32 has shared bytes 0-3, ESP32 is only 6 bytes, nRF52 is 8 bytes). Hashing distributes entropy uniformly regardless of source layout. The SECURITY comments are accurate about collision resistance and preimage resistance. This is a case where the abstraction provides real value.
